verification_commands.command: cargo fmt && cargo test -p cozmio memory_consolidation
verification_commands.evidence: memory_consolidation filter: 15 passed; 0 failed; 61 filtered out. semantic_boundary integration test binary: 0 tests run; 2 filtered out. Build completed with existing warnings.
experience_recorder filter: 4 passed; 0 failed; 72 filtered out. semantic_boundary integration test binary: 0 tests run; 2 filtered out. Build completed with existing warnings.
Finished dev profile successfully in 6.25s. Existing warnings remain; no compile errors.

changes_verified: Consolidation packets are built from recent experience_sources, related active memories, and an explicit current_hot_context field without adding semantic interpretation in code
Prompt builder includes local-only routing, tool descriptions, privacy/routing limits, and required boundary instructions
Manual deterministic consolidation command records consolidation_runs, validates and applies multiple operation requests, completes/fails run state, and records abstain in the run result

Operation application supports remember_episode, remember_reflection, remember_skill, update_hot_context, remove_or_supersede, and abstain mapped to episode, reflection, procedure, and hot_context_proposal layers
Duplicate exact active memories for the same layer/body/source_refs are not appended repeatedly
remove_or_supersede keeps superseded memories inspectable through storage while list_active excludes them from live recall
update_hot_context creates a hot_context_proposal draft memory and does not auto-apply human hot context
Scheduler hooks run after popup confirmed/cancelled/dismissed, confirmation expiry, executor completed/failed, and throttled idle periods; no hook runs on every observation
Tauri IPC/dev commands for building the consolidation prompt and running manual memory consolidation are registered

uncovered_areas.reason: No reliable live consolidation-specific model/parser path exists in the inspected codebase, so this task intentionally implements prompt-builder plus deterministic/manual operation application rather than fake model intelligence
uncovered_areas.impact: Automatic scheduler records prompt-only consolidation runs; actual memory-changing operations require the manual/dev command path or a future parser-backed agent

uncovered_areas.reason: The existing human_memory.rs module is stale/unregistered and depends on a missing context_files module, so Task 3 avoids compiling or modifying it and supplies an explicit empty current_hot_context fallback in production packet builders
uncovered_areas.impact: Packet schema and prompt include current_hot_context, and tests cover non-empty injected hot context; production automatic prompt-only packets currently carry an empty hot context until Task 4/hot context refactor provides a live source

uncovered_areas.area: Full workspace regression and live Tauri runtime invocation
uncovered_areas.reason: Required focused Rust verification commands were run; full workspace tests and live desktop IPC/UI automation were not requested or run
uncovered_areas.impact: Coverage is limited to focused consolidation/recorder tests and cozmio package check
